UncollatedReferenceQualifier, UnsignedShiftRight, UnsignedShiftRightAssignment, VariableDeclaration, VariableReference, VariableSpecification, VisibilityModifier, Volatile, While
public interface ProgramElement extends SourceElement, ModelElement
A part of the program syntax that carries semantics in the model.
